data.title: Trump's ultimatum to Fed governor Lisa Cook: resign or be fired. His power over the Fed is restricted.
data.description: The President announced his intention to dismiss Lisa Cook, a Federal Reserve governor, if she did not step down. However, his authority to terminate a Fed governor is restricted.

A UN report has confirmed famine in parts of Gaza, with nearly a quarter of the population facing starvation. UN aid chief Tom Fletcher blamed Israel’s blockade, but also called it ‘the world's famine’. ‘Everyone owns this… we've watched it happen in real time’.

data.title: Crypto market capitalization hits record high of $4.11 trillion in August 2025 as institutional confidence grows.
data.description: News analysis released by USA News Group on behalf of CEA Industries, Inc. disclosed that in August 2025, the total value of the cryptocurrency market exceeded $4.11 trillion. This milestone was achieved as institutional trust in the market reached unprecedented heights.

data.title: Clarkson Univ develops tool to prevent computer chips from overheating, ensuring performance and preventing failure.
data.description: In Potsdam, New York on August 22, 2025, it was reported that the high-performance chips fueling today's technology, from smartphones to gaming consoles and artificial intelligence, produce significant heat. Excessive heat leads to decreased performance, energy inefficiency, and potential hardware malfunctions. Researchers are studying this issue and developing solutions to address these challenges.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs see $1 billion outflow in a week as Ethereum gains momentum, experts remain optimistic.
data.description: In the last five days, Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) have experienced ongoing outflows due to a cautious market sentiment. Despite this trend, industry experts maintain a positive long-term perspective on the overall market direction, indicating a bullish outlook for Bitcoin.

data.title: CGTN America & CCTV UN discuss AI's impact on storytelling in report "Explore the Future of Storytelling with AI" - Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, CGTN America & CCTV UN announced the release of "Explore the Future of Storytelling with AI." This report highlights how Artificial Intelligence is reshaping various aspects of society, including social media and films. The widespread impact of AI is becoming increasingly apparent, marking a significant shift in how stories are told and consumed.

data.title: Connect with Purple Wave Auction at Farm Progress Show at Lot 914 in Decatur, IL from August 26-28 for futuristic equipment auctions.
data.description: Come to Lot 914 in MANHATTAN, Kan., from August 26 to 28 from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. for the Purple Wave Auction in Decatur, Ill. This equipment auction event promises a glimpse into the future, following its success at the 2024 Farm event.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Chester, VA creates challenging new chess game called Double Chess-Kingdom Chess-Dominion.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 22, 2025, an inventor from Chester, VA expressed the motivation behind creating a new chess game. The inventor aimed to provide a more demanding alternative to traditional chess, emphasizing the need for heightened strategy development. This resulted in the creation of "DOUBLE CHESS- KINGDOM CHESS- DOMINION...".

data.title: Medical Device Contract Manufacturing Market to reach $140.84B by 2030, with CAGR of 10.9%. Valued at $78.58B in 2024 and $83.77B in 2025.
data.description: In August 2025, the Medical Device Contract Manufacturing Market, which was worth US$78.58 billion in 2024, has now reached US$83.77 billion. Projections suggest it will continue to grow at a steady CAGR of 10.9% from 2025 to 2030, with expectations of reaching...
